chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 634 of 2019 C. P. No. D – 1420 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For directions 07.11.2023 Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate for petitioner in C. P. No. D-1420 of 2019. Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for respondent No.3 in C. P. No. D-634 of 2019. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- These petitions were disposed of vide order dated 25.05.2021 and have already served their purpose as petitioners’ removal from the positions of Secretary Board; and Dean of Law Faculty of Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur, was recalled. Hence, these petitions shall not be fixed in future for implementation of certain observations in the judgment. If the petitioners are of the view that certain observations passed by this Court or by the Supreme Court in regard to running of law colleges have not been implemented, then they may avail a proper remedy. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
